entries.source: Feynman Tutor
entries.value: Teagascóir Feynman

entries.source: Feynman Tutor AI Learning Mode is a focused way to use AI for learning instead of passive answer collection. The mode is built around a specific job: Try explaining a concept simply. Your tutor spots gaps, asks questions, and helps you rebuild the explanation.
entries.value: Is bealach dírithe é Mód Foghlama IS Feynman Tutor chun IS a úsáid don fhoghlaim seachas bailiú freagraí éighníomhach. Tá an mód tógtha timpeall ar phost ar leith: déan iarracht coincheap a mhíniú go simplí. Aimsíonn do theagascóir bearnaí, cuireann sé ceisteanna, agus cabhraíonn sé leat an míniú a atógáil.

entries.source: Finish by writing a five-bullet recap from memory, then ask for the one weak spot to review tomorrow.

entries.source: First-principles learning
entries.value: Foghlaim ó na chéad phrionsabail

entries.source: First, the tutor identifies the target. "I want to understand opportunity cost" is different from "I need to solve this economics homework question" or "I need to defend a position in debate." The target shapes the questions.
entries.value: Ar dtús, sainaithníonn an teagascóir an sprioc. Tá "Ba mhaith liom costas deise a thuiscint" difriúil ó "Caithfidh mé an cheist obair bhaile eacnamaíochta seo a réiteach" nó "Caithfidh mé seasamh a chosaint i ndíospóireacht." Múnlaíonn an sprioc na ceisteanna.

entries.source: Fit
entries.value: Oiriúnacht

entries.source: Flashcard Builder
entries.value: Tógálaí Splancchártaí

entries.source: Flashcard Builder prompts and study loop
entries.value: Prasaí agus lúb staidéir Flashcard Builder

entries.source: flashcard generation
entries.value: giniúint flashchártaí

entries.source: Flashcards are one of the simplest ways to do this.
entries.value: Tá spléachchártaí ar cheann de na bealaí is simplí chun é seo a dhéanamh.

entries.source: Flashcards are powerful, but they are not the whole study process. They are best for retrieval, vocabulary, definitions, formulas, distinctions, and key examples. They are weaker when the learner has never understood the idea in the first place.
entries.value: Tá spléachchártaí cumhachtach, ach ní hé an próiseas staidéir iomlán iad. Is fearr iad don aisghabháil, stór focal, sainmhínithe, foirmlí, idirdhealuithe, agus príomhshamplaí. Bíonn siad níos laige nuair nár thuig an foghlaimeoir an smaoineamh ar an gcéad dul síos.

entries.source: Flashcards work best when they test one idea at a time, reveal answers only after effort, and review missed cards sooner.
entries.value: Oibríonn spléachchártaí is fearr nuair a thástálann siad smaoineamh amháin ag an am, nuair nach nochtann siad freagraí ach tar éis iarrachta, agus nuair a athbhreithníonn siad cártaí caillte níos luaithe.

entries.source: Follow practical study workflows that connect free guest AI learning modes with guides, prompts, quizzes, and review loops.
entries.value: Lean sreafaí oibre praiticiúla staidéir a cheanglaíonn modhanna foghlama IS saor in aisce d’aíonna le treoracha, prasaí, tráthanna ceiste, agus lúba athbhreithnithe.

entries.source: Follow the story into live public pages.
entries.value: Lean an scéal isteach i leathanaigh phoiblí bheo.

entries.source: Footer links
entries.value: Naisc an fhoirne

entries.source: For
entries.value: Le haghaidh

entries.source: For a deeper route, read the Flashcard Builder guide and the Flashcard Builder prompts and study loop. The goal is not a beautiful deck. The goal is remembering more when the notes are gone.
entries.value: Le haghaidh bealach níos doimhne, léigh treoir Flashcard Builder agus prasaí agus lúb staidéir Flashcard Builder. Ní deic álainn an sprioc. Is é an sprioc níos mó a mheabhrú nuair atá na nótaí imithe.

entries.source: For a learner, that can feel very different from searching the web. Search gives pages. A learning companion gives a path.
entries.value: Do fhoghlaimeoir, is féidir leis sin mothú an-difriúil ó chuardach ar an ngréasán. Tugann cuardach leathanaigh. Tugann compánach foghlama conair.

entries.source: For a wider view of how the public pages connect, browse the AI learning map, the subject hubs, or the AI learning prompt library. Those pages are designed to make the product understandable to learners and discoverable to search systems without hiding the useful parts behind an account wall.
entries.value: Le haghaidh léargas níos leithne ar conas a cheanglaíonn na leathanaigh phoiblí, brabhsáil mapa foghlama IS, na moil ábhair, nó leabharlann prasanna foghlama IS. Tá na leathanaigh sin deartha chun an táirge a dhéanamh intuigthe d’fhoghlaimeoirí agus infhaighte do chórais chuardaigh gan na codanna úsáideacha a cheilt taobh thiar de bhalla cuntais.

entries.source: For example, a learner studying democracy might talk with Ambedkar, then ask Source Critic to evaluate a speech or constitutional passage. A learner studying a city can start with Geography Explorer to understand place, then move into historical conversation.
entries.value: Mar shampla, d’fhéadfadh foghlaimeoir atá ag staidéar daonlathais labhairt le Ambedkar, ansin iarraidh ar Source Critic óráid nó sliocht bunreachtúil a mheas. Is féidir le foghlaimeoir atá ag staidéar cathrach tosú le Geography Explorer chun áit a thuiscint, ansin bogadh isteach i gcomhrá stairiúil.

entries.source: For teachers
entries.value: Do mhúinteoirí

entries.source: For the first time, a former colony with no prior national history became a global power. The kings and queens of Europe were overthrown, and the United States of America emerged as a symbol of democracy, capitalism, and a free world. At the same time, a new ideology of communism emerged and the Soviet Union became its practical embodiment.
entries.value: Den chéad uair, tháinig iar-choilíneacht gan stair náisiúnta roimhe sin chun bheith ina cumhacht dhomhanda. Cuireadh ríthe agus banríonacha na hEorpa as cumhacht, agus tháinig Stáit Aontaithe Mheiriceá chun cinn mar shiombail den daonlathas, den chaipitleachas, agus de dhomhan saor. Ag an am céanna, tháinig idé-eolaíocht nua an chumannachais chun cinn agus rinneadh an tAontas Sóivéadach dá léiriú praiticiúil.

entries.source: For this mode, the job is simple: Ask any question and learn through clear explanations, examples, follow-up prompts, and patient AI tutoring.
entries.value: Don mhód seo, tá an post simplí: cuir ceist ar bith agus foghlaim trí mhínithe soiléire, samplaí, prasaí leantacha, agus teagasc foighneach IS.

entries.source: For this mode, the job is simple: Ask questions, challenge ideas, and learn history through grounded conversations with public figures from the past.
entries.value: Don mhód seo, tá an post simplí: cuir ceisteanna, tabhair dúshlán do smaointe, agus foghlaim stair trí chomhráite bunaithe le pearsana poiblí ón am atá caite.

entries.source: For this mode, the job is simple: Brainstorm projects, stories, designs, titles, experiments, and unexpected angles.
entries.value: Don mhód seo, tá an post simplí: déan tobsmaointeoireacht ar thionscadail, scéalta, dearaí, teidil, turgnaimh, agus uillinneacha gan choinne.

entries.source: For this mode, the job is simple: Bring a passage or book idea and build comprehension through summaries, vocabulary, inference, and discussion.
entries.value: Don mhód seo, tá an post simplí: tabhair sliocht nó smaoineamh leabhair agus tóg tuiscint trí achoimrí, stór focal, tátal, agus plé.

entries.source: For this mode, the job is simple: Build a temporal passport, clear the travel advisory, and explore a historical world through scene, map, timeline, people, rules, inventory, and evidence.
entries.value: Don mhód seo, tá an post simplí: tóg pas ama, glan an chomhairle taistil, agus fiosraigh domhan stairiúil trí radharc, mapa, amlíne, daoine, rialacha, fardal, agus fianaise.

entries.source: For this mode, the job is simple: Build vocabulary with meaning, examples, pronunciation cues, memory hooks, and quick practice.
entries.value: Don mhód seo, tá an post simplí: tóg stór focal le brí, samplaí, leideanna fuaimnithe, crúcaí cuimhne, agus cleachtadh tapa.

entries.source: For this mode, the job is simple: Convert facts, lists, speeches, or sequences into memorable mental scenes.
entries.value: Don mhód seo, tá an post simplí: tiontaigh fíricí, liostaí, óráidí, nó seichimh ina radhairc mheabhracha chuimhneacha.

entries.source: For this mode, the job is simple: Create a study plan around your time, energy, goals, and weak spots.
entries.value: Don mhód seo, tá an post simplí: cruthaigh plean staidéir timpeall ar d’am, d’fhuinneamh, do spriocanna, agus do phointí laga.

entries.source: For this mode, the job is simple: Debate any topic, get challenged, compare claims, and learn how to make stronger arguments.
entries.value: Don mhód seo, tá an post simplí: déan díospóireacht ar aon ábhar, glac dúshlán, déan comparáid idir maímh, agus foghlaim conas argóintí níos láidre a dhéanamh.

entries.source: For this mode, the job is simple: Enter a realistic case, make decisions, see consequences, and learn the principle behind each choice.
entries.value: Don mhód seo, tá an post simplí: téigh isteach i gcás réalaíoch, déan cinntí, féach iarmhairtí, agus foghlaim an prionsabal taobh thiar de gach rogha.

entries.source: For this mode, the job is simple: Evaluate articles, claims, videos, or posts for evidence, bias, reliability, and missing context.
entries.value: Don mhód seo, tá an post simplí: measúnaigh ailt, maímh, físeáin, nó postálacha ó thaobh fianaise, claontachta, iontaofachta, agus comhthéacs atá ar iarraidh.

entries.source: For this mode, the job is simple: Explore artworks, styles, artists, visual choices, and what makes an image powerful.
entries.value: Don mhód seo, tá an post simplí: fiosraigh saothair ealaíne, stíleanna, ealaíontóirí, roghanna amhairc, agus cad a dhéanann íomhá cumhachtach.

entries.source: For this mode, the job is simple: Explore careers through interests, skills, day-in-the-life examples, and next steps.
entries.value: Don mhód seo, tá an post simplí: fiosraigh gairmeacha trí shuimeanna, scileanna, samplaí de lá sa saol, agus na chéad chéimeanna eile.

entries.source: For this mode, the job is simple: Explore countries, cities, rivers, climates, migration, resources, and how geography shapes life.
entries.value: Don mhód seo, tá an post simplí: fiosraigh tíortha, cathracha, aibhneacha, aeráidí, imirce, acmhainní, agus conas a mhúnlaíonn tíreolaíocht an saol.

entries.source: For this mode, the job is simple: Explore identity, knowledge, fairness, freedom, happiness, and other deep questions through careful reasoning.
entries.value: Don mhód seo, tá an post simplí: fiosraigh féiniúlacht, eolas, cothroime, saoirse, sonas, agus ceisteanna doimhne eile trí réasúnaíocht chúramach.

entries.source: For this mode, the job is simple: Generate a focused multiple-choice quiz on any subject and review explanations after each answer.
entries.value: Don mhód seo, tá an post simplí: gin tráth ceiste ilrogha dírithe ar aon ábhar agus athbhreithnigh mínithe tar éis gach freagra.

entries.source: For this mode, the job is simple: Get unstuck emotionally, find a smaller next step, and rebuild momentum without guilt.
entries.value: Don mhód seo, tá an post simplí: éirigh as bheith greamaithe go mothúchánach, aimsigh chéad chéim níos lú, agus atóg móiminteam gan chiontacht.

entries.source: For this mode, the job is simple: Get unstuck on homework with ethical hints, examples, checks, and step-by-step coaching.
entries.value: Don mhód seo, tá an post simplí: éirigh as bheith greamaithe san obair bhaile le leideanna eiticiúla, samplaí, seiceálacha, agus cóitseáil céim ar chéim.

entries.source: For this mode, the job is simple: Improve writing with planning, revision, structure, and feedback that keeps your voice intact.
entries.value: Don mhód seo, tá an post simplí: feabhsaigh scríbhneoireacht le pleanáil, athbhreithniú, struchtúr, agus aiseolas a choinníonn do ghuth slán.

entries.source: For this mode, the job is simple: Learn by doing, seeing, comparing, repairing, and proving mastery. The app builds a live lesson canvas around your goal instead of turning instruction into a long chat. Try: "Teach me financial modeling."
entries.value: Don mhód seo, tá an post simplí: foghlaim trí dhéanamh, féachaint, comparáid, deisiú, agus máistreacht a chruthú. Tógann an aip canbhás ceachta beo timpeall ar do sprioc seachas teagasc a iompú ina chomhrá fada. Bain triail as: "Múin samhaltú airgeadais dom."

entries.source: For this mode, the job is simple: Learn constitutions, democracy, elections, courts, rights, duties, and public policy.
entries.value: Don mhód seo, tá an post simplí: foghlaim bunreachtaí, daonlathas, toghcháin, cúirteanna, cearta, dualgais, agus beartas poiblí.

entries.source: For this mode, the job is simple: Learn notes, chords, scales, rhythm, ear training ideas, and how songs are built.
entries.value: Don mhód seo, tá an post simplí: foghlaim nótaí, cordaí, scálaí, rithim, smaointe oiliúna cluaise, agus conas a thógtar amhráin.

entries.source: For this mode, the job is simple: Learn through focused questions, hints, and reflection instead of passive answer reading.
entries.value: Don mhód seo, tá an post simplí: foghlaim trí cheisteanna dírithe, leideanna, agus machnamh seachas léamh freagraí éighníomhach.

entries.source: For this mode, the job is simple: Make learning feel like a game with quests, levels, points, challenges, and boss rounds.
entries.value: Don mhód seo, tá an post simplí: cuir cuma cluiche ar an bhfoghlaim le rompu, leibhéil, pointí, dúshláin, agus babhtaí boss.

entries.source: For this mode, the job is simple: Map how ideas relate, from causes and effects to categories, examples, and contradictions.
entries.value: Don mhód seo, tá an post simplí: mapaigh conas a bhaineann smaointe lena chéile, ó chúiseanna agus éifeachtaí go catagóirí, samplaí, agus contrárthachtaí.

entries.source: For this mode, the job is simple: Notice what helps you learn, what gets in the way, and how to become a stronger learner.
entries.value: Don mhód seo, tá an post simplí: tabhair faoi deara cad a chabhraíonn leat foghlaim, cad a chuireann isteach ort, agus conas a bheith i d’fhoghlaimeoir níos láidre.

entries.source: For this mode, the job is simple: Open a shared workspace with an AI collaborator. Make a rough artifact, trade edits, challenge weak spots, log decisions, and leave with concrete progress.
entries.value: Don mhód seo, tá an post simplí: oscail spás oibre comhroinnte le comhoibrí IS. Déan déantán garbh, malartaigh eagarthóireacht, tabhair dúshlán do phointí laga, logáil cinntí, agus fág le dul chun cinn coincréiteach.

entries.source: For this mode, the job is simple: Paste a question, your answer, and the expected answer if you have it. Your buddy explains the reasoning and helps you avoid the same mistake next time.
entries.value: Don mhód seo, tá an post simplí: greamaigh ceist, do fhreagra, agus an freagra a bhfuiltear ag súil leis má tá sé agat. Míníonn do chara an réasúnaíocht agus cabhraíonn sé leat an botún céanna a sheachaint an chéad uair eile.

entries.source: For this mode, the job is simple: Paste data, chart descriptions, or results and learn what they mean, what they do not mean, and what to ask next.
entries.value: Don mhód seo, tá an post simplí: greamaigh sonraí, tuairiscí cairte, nó torthaí agus foghlaim cad is brí leo, cad nach gciallaíonn siad, agus cad ba chóir a iarraidh ina dhiaidh sin.

entries.source: For this mode, the job is simple: Plan a school, creative, coding, or personal project with scope, milestones, blockers, and next actions.
entries.value: Don mhód seo, tá an post simplí: pleanáil tionscadal scoile, cruthaitheach, códaithe, nó pearsanta le raon, clocha míle, bacainní, agus na chéad ghníomhartha eile.

entries.source: For this mode, the job is simple: Plan and run quick review sessions that strengthen long-term memory.
entries.value: Don mhód seo, tá an post simplí: pleanáil agus rith seisiúin athbhreithnithe thapa a neartaíonn cuimhne fhadtéarmach.

entries.source: For this mode, the job is simple: Plan safe demonstrations, understand variables, predict outcomes, and reason from evidence like a scientist.
entries.value: Don mhód seo, tá an post simplí: pleanáil taispeántais shábháilte, tuig athróga, tuar torthaí, agus réasúnaigh ó fhianaise cosúil le heolaí.

entries.source: For this mode, the job is simple: Play with markets, scarcity, incentives, policy, and personal finance through simple simulations.
entries.value: Don mhód seo, tá an post simplí: imir le margaí, ganntanas, dreasachtaí, beartas, agus airgeadas pearsanta trí insamhluithe simplí.

entries.source: For this mode, the job is simple: Practice a language in realistic scenarios like cafes, interviews, travel, and daily life, with corrections after each turn.
entries.value: Don mhód seo, tá an post simplí: cleacht teanga i gcásanna réalaíocha cosúil le caiféanna, agallaimh, taisteal, agus saol laethúil, le ceartúcháin tar éis gach seala.

entries.source: For this mode, the job is simple: Practice argument by debating a public or fictional personality on a topic you choose.
entries.value: Don mhód seo, tá an post simplí: cleacht argóint trí dhíospóireacht a dhéanamh le pearsantacht phoiblí nó fhicseanúil ar ábhar a roghnaíonn tú.

entries.source: For this mode, the job is simple: Practice negotiation, conflict, customer support, leadership, or any high-stakes conversation.
entries.value: Don mhód seo, tá an post simplí: cleacht caibidlíocht, coimhlint, tacaíocht custaiméara, ceannaireacht, nó aon chomhrá ardriosca.

entries.source: For this mode, the job is simple: Practice viva, oral exams, project defenses, and rapid follow-up questions with calm feedback.
entries.value: Don mhód seo, tá an post simplí: cleacht viva, scrúduithe béil, cosaintí tionscadail, agus ceisteanna leantacha tapa le haiseolas socair.

entries.source: For this mode, the job is simple: Prepare for school, internship, job, or scholarship interviews with realistic questions and feedback.
entries.value: Don mhód seo, tá an post simplí: ullmhaigh d’agallaimh scoile, intéirneachta, poist, nó scoláireachta le ceisteanna agus aiseolas réalaíoch.

entries.source: For this mode, the job is simple: Prepare speeches, presentations, interviews, or oral exams with prompts, timing, and feedback on structure.
entries.value: Don mhód seo, tá an post simplí: ullmhaigh óráidí, cur i láthair, agallaimh, nó scrúduithe béil le prasaí, uainiú, agus aiseolas ar struchtúr.

entries.source: For this mode, the job is simple: Say what you think is happening, and your buddy diagnoses hidden misconceptions with gentle tests.
entries.value: Don mhód seo, tá an post simplí: abair cad a cheapann tú atá ag tarlú, agus déanann do chara diagnóis ar mhíthuiscintí ceilte le tástálacha séimhe.

entries.source: For this mode, the job is simple: Try explaining a concept simply. Your tutor spots gaps, asks questions, and helps you rebuild the explanation.
entries.value: Don mhód seo, tá an post simplí: déan iarracht coincheap a mhíniú go simplí. Aimsíonn do theagascóir bearnaí, cuireann sé ceisteanna, agus cabhraíonn sé leat an míniú a atógáil.

entries.source: For this mode, the job is simple: Turn a broad topic into research questions, search terms, outlines, and source notes.
entries.value: Don mhód seo, tá an post simplí: tiontaigh ábhar leathan ina cheisteanna taighde, téarmaí cuardaigh, imlínte, agus nótaí foinse.

entries.source: For this mode, the job is simple: Turn concepts into stories, characters, conflicts, and memorable scenes.
entries.value: Don mhód seo, tá an post simplí: tiontaigh coincheapa ina scéalta, carachtair, coimhlintí, agus radhairc chuimhneacha.

entries.source: For this mode, the job is simple: Turn intentions into small repeatable learning habits with triggers, rewards, and recovery plans.
entries.value: Don mhód seo, tá an post simplí: tiontaigh intinní ina nósanna foghlama beaga in-athúsáidte le truicir, luaíochtaí, agus pleananna téarnaimh.

entries.source: For this mode, the job is simple: Turn notes or topics into focused flashcards with hints, answers, examples, and common traps.
entries.value: Don mhód seo, tá an post simplí: tiontaigh nótaí nó ábhair ina spléachchártaí dírithe le leideanna, freagraí, samplaí, agus gaistí coitianta.

entries.source: For this mode, the job is simple: Turn your syllabus, exam date, time, and weak areas into a practical study plan.
entries.value: Don mhód seo, tá an post simplí: tiontaigh do shiollabas, dáta scrúdaithe, am, agus réimsí laga ina bplean staidéir praiticiúil.

entries.source: For this mode, the job is simple: Understand code, debug errors, learn programming concepts, and build small projects step by step.
entries.value: Don mhód seo, tá an post simplí: tuig cód, dífhabhtaigh earráidí, foghlaim coincheapa ríomhchláraithe, agus tóg tionscadail bheaga céim ar chéim.

entries.source: For this mode, the job is simple: Unpack historical events through causes, triggers, consequences, and alternative possibilities.
entries.value: Don mhód seo, tá an post simplí: díphacáil imeachtaí stairiúla trí chúiseanna, spreagthaí, iarmhairtí, agus féidearthachtaí eile.

entries.source: For this mode, the job is simple: Work through algebra, calculus, word problems, and math concepts one step at a time with an AI coach.
entries.value: Don mhód seo, tá an post simplí: oibrigh trí ailgéabar, calcalas, fadhbanna focal, agus coincheapa matamaitice céim ar chéim le cóitseálaí IS.

entries.source: For this mode, the job is simple: Work through dilemmas by weighing stakeholders, consequences, duties, rights, and tradeoffs.
entries.value: Don mhód seo, tá an post simplí: oibrigh trí aincheisteanna trí pháirtithe leasmhara, iarmhairtí, dualgais, cearta, agus malairtí a mheá.

entries.source: For writing, that means using Writing Coach to improve a thesis, structure, or paragraph while keeping your voice. For code, it means using Code Tutor to explain errors, ask you to predict output, and help you debug rather than pasting a complete solution. For exams, it means using Exam Prep Planner to decide what to review first and how to test yourself.
entries.value: I gcás scríbhneoireachta, ciallaíonn sé sin Writing Coach a úsáid chun tráchtas, struchtúr, nó mír a fheabhsú agus do ghuth a choinneáil. I gcás cód, ciallaíonn sé Code Tutor a úsáid chun earráidí a mhíniú, iarraidh ort aschur a thuar, agus cabhrú leat dífhabhtú seachas réiteach iomlán a ghreamú. I gcás scrúduithe, ciallaíonn sé Exam Prep Planner a úsáid chun cinneadh a dhéanamh cad ba chóir a athbhreithniú ar dtús agus conas tú féin a thástáil.

entries.source: Format this website in MLA
entries.value: Cuir an suíomh gréasáin seo i bhformáid MLA

entries.source: Format, flag missing data, and explain how to verify the source details.
entries.value: Formáidigh, marcáil sonraí atá ar iarraidh, agus mínigh conas sonraí na foinse a fhíorú.

entries.source: Foundational guides for explanations, tutoring behavior, study habits, prompt quality, and choosing the right learning mode.
entries.value: Treoracha bunúsacha le haghaidh mínithe, iompar teagaisc, nósanna staidéir, cáilíocht prasanna, agus an mód foghlama ceart a roghnú.

entries.source: Free AI Quiz Builder For Any Topic is a focused way to use AI for learning instead of passive answer collection. The mode is built around a specific job: Pick any topic and face a focused 10-question multiple-choice quiz. You answer one question at a time, get instant feedback, and finish with a score and review.
entries.value: Is bealach dírithe é Tógálaí Tráth Ceiste IS Saor in Aisce d’Aon Ábhar chun IS a úsáid don fhoghlaim seachas bailiú freagraí éighníomhach. Tá an mód tógtha timpeall ar phost ar leith: roghnaigh ábhar ar bith agus tabhair aghaidh ar thráth ceiste ilrogha 10 gceist dírithe. Freagraíonn tú ceist amháin ag an am, faigheann tú aiseolas láithreach, agus críochnaíonn tú le scór agus athbhreithniú.
